interface.longDescription:
Find the right new or used car by describing what you're looking for in plain language.

Search vehicle listings using specific criteria like price, make, model, or mileage - or broader needs such as "cars that are safe in the snow," "great family cars," or "reliable commuter vehicles."

Explore matching listings with high-quality photos, full vehicle specifications, safety information, and dealer details. Whether you're comparing options or narrowing down to a shortlist, the app helps you translate real-world needs into confident car-buying decisions.
defaultPrompt: Most reliable cars built to last over 200K miles
